$comment: Eval ticket corpus: identical tasks filed once per variant. Keep tasks small, deterministic-ish, and verifiable so differences reflect the variant, not task luck.

tasks.title: eval: link docs from README
tasks.prompt: Add a Documentation section to README.md linking every markdown documentation file in the repository root, each with a one-line description. Every link must point to a file that actually exists.

tasks.title: eval: add gitignore
tasks.prompt: Add a .gitignore appropriate for a plain markdown/documentation repository (editor swap files, OS cruft, log files). Keep it under 20 lines.

tasks.title: eval: add glossary
tasks.prompt: Create GLOSSARY.md defining every Workhorse-specific term used in the existing markdown files of this repo (scan them first). Each entry: term, one-sentence definition, and the file where it appears.
